errors.root_cause: Assumed Docker installed. System has Podman 5.8.1 instead.
errors.fix: Install podman-compose via pip, use docker.io/ registry prefix in image name
errors.lesson: Check runtime environment before assuming Docker. Fedora defaults to Podman.

errors.error: Error: short-name resolution enforced but cannot prompt without a TTY
errors.root_cause: n8nio/n8n:latest is a short name. Podman on Fedora enforces full registry paths.
errors.lesson: Podman on Fedora/RHEL requires fully qualified image names (docker.io/...).

errors.error: SQLITE_CONSTRAINT: NOT NULL constraint failed: workflow_entity.id
errors.root_cause: Workflow JSON had no id field. n8n requires id for import.
errors.lesson: n8n import:workflow requires an id field in workflow JSON.

errors.root_cause: n8n basic auth (N8N_BASIC_AUTH_ACTIVE) only protects the UI. The /api/v1/ REST API requires a separate API key generated from UI.
errors.fix: Insert API key directly into user_api_keys SQLite table
errors.lesson: N8N_BASIC_AUTH_ACTIVE != REST API auth. They are separate systems.

errors.root_cause: n8n owner account had email=null (setup wizard not completed). API key auth checks user state.
errors.lesson: n8n won't accept API key auth until the owner setup wizard is completed.

errors.error: Internal Server Error 500 on first attempt
errors.root_cause: Password validation failed silently in first attempt (no uppercase). 500 on second attempt was actually success - owner already existed from a prior session.
errors.fix: Verified via SQLite: owner was created with email=flowpersona@proton.me
errors.lesson: n8n returns 500 when owner already exists. Check DB before assuming failure.

errors.error: Active version not found for workflow with id 'solen-pipeline-001'
errors.root_cause: workflow_entity.activeVersionId was NULL. Setting active=1 via DB is not enough - n8n also requires activeVersionId to match a workflow_history row.
errors.fix: UPDATE workflow_entity SET activeVersionId=versionId WHERE id='solen-pipeline-001'
errors.lesson: n8n activation requires both active=1 AND activeVersionId set in DB.

errors.root_cause: n8n 2.12.x runs Code nodes via JS Task Runner in isolated VM sandbox. fetch() is not available in the sandbox even though it exists in Node.js 24.
errors.fix: Replace all fetch() calls with n8n HTTP Request nodes
errors.lesson: n8n Code nodes (v2) are sandboxed. No fetch(), no require(), no Node.js globals. HTTP calls must use HTTP Request nodes.

errors.error: access to env vars denied. See N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE
errors.root_cause: n8n 2.x blocks $env access in nodes by default.
errors.lesson: n8n 2.x ships with env var access blocked in nodes. Must explicitly re-enable.

errors.root_cause: Used specifyBody:'string' + body:'={{ JSON.stringify({model:...}) }}'. specifyBody is only valid for contentType json/form-urlencoded. For raw string body, must use contentType:'raw'.
errors.fix: Extract payload build to separate Code node, use contentType:'raw' + rawContentType:'application/json' + body:'={{ $json.claudePayload }}'
errors.lesson: n8n HTTP Request v4.2: specifyBody is ONLY for json/form-urlencoded. Raw string body = contentType:'raw' + rawContentType + body.

errors.error: 422 Api key required / 401 Invalid API key
errors.root_cause: Used '=Bearer {{ $env.PERPLEXITY_API_KEY }}' - mixing n8n expression delimiters incorrectly. Also introduced .$env (dot prefix) via Python script bug.
errors.lesson: n8n expression syntax: ={{ expr }}. Never mix with {{ }} handlebars syntax.

errors.root_cause: PENDING - Claude is being called (23s execution) but response content array may not include tool_use. Possibly: (a) model returns text block instead, (b) tool_choice enforcement not working, (c) response is an error object.
errors.fix: IN PROGRESS - need to inspect raw Claude response

n8n_code_node_v2.http_alternative: Use HTTP Request node, not Code node

iteration_timing.action: fetch not defined → full architectural refactor
Bearer expression syntax + Python script bug

assumption_failures: Short image names work in Podman → WRONG on Fedora
N8N_BASIC_AUTH_ACTIVE enables REST API auth → WRONG, separate systems
Setting active=1 in DB activates webhook → WRONG, also needs activeVersionId
n8n Code nodes have fetch() → WRONG, sandboxed VM
specifyBody:'string' sends raw body → WRONG, use contentType:'raw'
N8N_RUNNERS_DISABLED=true disables task runner → WRONG, runner still starts
podman restart picks up docker-compose env changes → WRONG, need podman-compose down/up

correct_n8n_pipeline_architecture.rule: Code nodes = transform only. HTTP Request nodes = all external calls.
working_pattern: HTTP Request node → external API call
Respond to Webhook node → returns final JSON

numbers.biggest_time_sink_reason: fetch not defined required full workflow rebuild from Code-node-based to HTTP-Request-node-based architecture
